summary: DeviceManagement Tab Features Testing - All 9 features tested successfully. Checkboxes for bulk selection and column settings (gear icon) are fully functional.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing device data
context_for_next_testing_agent: DeviceManagement Tab now has same features as Locations Tab: checkboxes for bulk selection and column settings with gear icon.

individual_checkboxes.details: Individual checkbox selection works, text updated to '1 von 216 Geräten ausgewählt'
